content: I'll decompose this scenario into a single implementation task for the /goodbye endpoint.

function.name: decompose_task
function.arguments: {"goal":"Implement /goodbye endpoint in main.go and add unit tests in main_test.go","nodes":[{"id":"implement-goodbye","prompt":"Refactor main.go to expose buildMux() *http.ServeMux containing both / and /goodbye routes; the /goodbye handler must write Content-Type application/json and a JSON body {\"message\": \"Goodbye, World!\"}. Add main_test.go that exercises buildMux() via net/http/httptest and asserts status, content-type, and body.","role":"developer","depends_on":[],"file_scope":["main.go","main_test.go"],"scenario_ids":["scenario.1","scenario.2"]}]}
